summary: Salesperson Performance Dashboard feature testing complete. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Rep Performance tab renders correctly with all components (KPI cards, charts, leaderboard, time selector, refresh button). Empty states display correctly as expected since there are no assigned reps yet.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span>. This is a React rendering issue in the Sales Orders table but does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console shows recharts warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) during initial render. This is a known recharts issue when container is not yet sized.
Minor: HTML hydration warning in SalesDashboardPage - <tr> inside <span> - this is a React rendering issue but doesn't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Salesperson Performance Dashboard feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/salesperson-dashboard/overview, /trend, /detail/{code} all working. Frontend: Rep Performance tab accessible at /sales-inventory?tab=rep-performance. Currently shows empty states (0 active reps, 3 unassigned docs) which is expected since rep assignment is new. All data-testid attributes working: salesperson-dashboard-page, metric-*, volume-chart, trend-chart, rep-leaderboard, days-select, refresh-btn.

verified: Returns totals object with total_documents, total_auto_created, active_reps, overall_success_rate
Returns salespersons array (empty when no assigned reps)
Returns unassigned bucket with 3 docs, 2 customers
Supports days parameter: 7, 30, 90, 180, 365
Validates days range (1-365)
Returns interval, days, and data array
Supports interval: day, week, month
Returns trend data points with period, total, auto_created, success_rate
Validates interval parameter
Validates minimum days (7)
Returns salesperson info (code, name, email)
Returns total_customers count
Returns customer_breakdown array

Handles non-existent salesperson codes gracefully
Rep Performance tab appears between Sales Orders and Inventory Ledger
Tab order: Sales Orders -> Rep Performance -> Inventory Ledger
All tabs clickable and navigate correctly
URL updates to ?tab=rep-performance
Active Reps card (metric-active-reps) - shows 0 with 90d window

Days selector (days-select) - dropdown with 7, 30, 90, 180, 365 day options
Days selector changes data when selection changes
Refresh button (refresh-btn) - triggers data reload
